ruleBookInfo.author: .text-small@a@span@text##\s
ruleBookInfo.intro: var novelIntro=({title,author,genre,score,desc})=>['','✧*̥₊˚‧☆･ﾟ'.repeat(3),`📖书名：《${title}》`,`👤作者：${author}`,`🏷️类型：${genre}`,`✨最新章节：${latestChapterTitle}`,'✦ ─────────────── ✦',`${desc}`,'❈'.padEnd(20,'～*')].join('\n').replace(/^/gm,'　　'); var latestChapterTitle=`{{@@.my-unit-md@span@text}}` var intro=`{{@@.text-medium@text##最近章節}}` novelIntro({ "title": book.name, "author": book.author, "genre": book.kind, "latestChapterTitle":latestChapterTitle, "desc": intro }) ##(^|[。！？]+[”」）】]?)##$1
ruleBookInfo.name: .text-xl@textNodes

ruleContent.content: var data=JSON.parse(result) var imageList=data.data.info.images.images var imgTags = imageList.map(item => ``).join('\n'); imgTags;

var id=`{{$..id}}`

r;
</js>

    let t=Math.floor(Date.now());

    let imgurl = url + 'index.php/api/code?' + Math.random();
    let code=java.getVerificationCode(imgurl);
    url=`${url}index.php/search?key=${key}&verify=1&pcode=${code}&_=${t}`
    uri=java.ajax(url)
    c = cookie.getCookie(url);

}

}

250414更新日志:
新增快速搜索
搜索关键词：m:我的     漫画搜索
搜索关键词：t:我的      听书搜索
搜索关键词：d:我的     短剧搜索
搜索关键词：我的        根据自定义模式搜索

250416更新日志:
新增快速搜索
书籍名@来源
目前支持来源：番茄、七猫、得间、QQ、熊猫、塔读、69书吧、伪69、喜马拉雅、小米、猫眼、百度、米读、顶点、星星小说、笔趣阁22、爱下电子书、搜书神器、得奇

250416更新日志:
恢复69书吧使用:www.69shuba.com
由于搜索可靠性不高，可能搜索时间较长，故不加入全部搜索，请点击69书吧搜索使用

250101新增番茄来源
250203新增七猫来源
250204新增得间来源
250204新增QQ来源(仅支持免费小说)
250204新增熊猫看书
250210更新日志：
1.采用全新验证方式，之后未填写密钥，可以在阅读页登陆后刷新阅读页面即可！
2.搜索默认改为全局搜索，目前仅支持番茄，七猫，QQ，得间，熊猫，后面的按钮是预设，后期会添加相关来源
3.新增大灰狼书架功能，在登陆里面点击书架查看

下个版本预计更新内容：
1.预计发现页新增阅读记录和大灰狼书架栏目
2.预计新增阅读记录，阅读过的书籍可在大灰狼书架-阅读历史中查看
3.预计新增塔读小说，米读小说，小米阅读，猫眼看书，部分起点

250213更新日志:
新增塔读，69书吧，笔趣阁，喜马拉雅
新增大灰狼书架同步功能(书籍详情页刷新同步)

250214更新日志:
新增小米阅读，修复登录失效的问题

250218更新日志:
新增百度免费小说，新增猫眼免费小说，新增下载提醒

250218更新日志:
新增歪瑞古德漫画

250227更新日志:
开放安卓端短剧模式

250302更新日志:
修复切换服务器后目录加载失败的问题

250302更新日志:
修复bug

250304更新日志:
修复听书模式识别失败bug

250309更新日志:

	let url = `https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id={{$.book_id}}`;
        let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).data[0]; 
        return last["last_chapter_title"]+" · "+java.timeFormat(last["last_chapter_update_time"]*1000);
	
	}

	
function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];
let last2 =  `${last["latest_chapter_title"]} · ${java.timeFormat(last['update_time']*1000)} `

        const cleanNickName = comment.updateTime.replace(/T/g,'  ').replace(/\..*/g, '');
        // 根据分数生成星星显示
        const generateStars = (score) => {
            let starCount = Math.min(Math.floor(score / 2), 5);
            let stars = '';
            for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
                stars += i < starCount? '★' : '☆';

            return stars;

        const starDisplay = generateStars(comment.score);
        return `

 ${comment.content}

`;

} catch (error) {
    const errorLog = {
        [SyntaxError.name]: '数据解析失败: ',
        default: 'AJAX请求失败: '

    java.log(errorLog);
}

<js>
 if (baseUrl.match(/novel/)){
	book.type = 8;
 //java.toast('当前为小说模式🧾'); 
 var data = [];

var m = list.length;
var k = /menu/.test(list) && /展开章节/.test(list) ? 1 : 0;
//java.log(n+'/'+m+'/'+k);
for (i in list) {
    if (i >= m - n - k) {break}
    var list_i = /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? list[i].select("span")[0] : list[i].select("a");
    data.push({
        title: String(list_i.text()).replace(book.name, "").replace(/^\s+|\snew/g, ""),
        link: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? "" : `${getUrl()}${list[i].select("a").attr("href")}`,
        time: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0])  ? "" : String(list[i].select("span").text()).replace(/游客/g,'✨').replace(/币/g,'💰').replace(/new\s/g,''),
        vol: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false,
        vip: /币/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false
    });
}
data;

 //java.toast('当前为漫画模式🧾');

        vol: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false,

    });
}
data;

  var data = []

 data.push({

 data

searchUrl:
<js>
 v = String(source.getVariable()).split(",");
 x = v[0];
let url = `${getUrl()}`;
let uri="data:;base64,辞晨,{'type':''}";
try {
	if (x == 0){
	url +=	`api/novel/app/novel/search?category=&excludeTags=&keyword=${key}&orderType=0&page=${page}&searchType=1&size=40`
	ss = java.get(url,{	'user-agent': ua});
				}else if (x == 1) {
url +=	`api/comic/app/comic/search?keyword=${key}&orderType=1&page=${page}&searchType=1&size=40`
ss = java.get(url,{	'user-agent': ua});
     }else if (x == 2 ) {
url +=	`api/video/app/video/search?keyword=${key}&orderType=1&page=${page}&searchType=1&size=40`
ss = java.get(url,{	'user-agent': ua});
	   	}else if (x == 3 ) {
url +=	`api/audio/app/audio/search?category=&keyword={{encodeURIComponent(key)}}&orderType=0&page=${page}&searchType=1&size=42`
ss = java.get(url,{	'user-agent': ua});
}
let code = ss.statusCode();
if (code==302||code==301) {
	uri=ss.header("location");
	}
	else if (code == 200) {
	cache.put('urlss', ss.body());
		}else if (code == 502) {
		java.toast('\n'+'👻ip被拉黑了👻')
}
	}catch(err) {
		java.log('💔访问出错💔')
		java.toast('\n💔访问出错，请换接口💔')
	}
	uri;
</js>

url +=	`api/video/app/video/search?keyword=${key}&orderType=1&page=${page}&searchType=1&size=40`
ss = java.get(url,{	'user-agent': ua});
	   	}else if (x == 3 ) {
url +=	`api/audio/app/audio/search?category=&keyword={{encodeURIComponent(key)}}&orderType=0&page=${page}&searchType=1&size=42`
ss = java.get(url,{	'user-agent': ua});
}
java.log(ss.ss.statusCode())
java.log(String(Object.keys(ss)))
let code = ss.statusCode();
if (code==302||code==301) {
	uri=ss.header("location");
	}
	else if (code == 200) {
	cache.put('urlss', ss.body());
		}else if (code == 502) {
		java.toast('\n'+'👻ip被拉黑了👻')
}
	}catch(err) {
		java.log('💔访问出错💔')
		java.log(String(err))
		java.toast('\n💔访问出错，更换域名💔')
	}
	uri;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var datax = null;
var allChapters = [];
var finalJsonOutput = null;
var inputString = baseUrl;
var parts = inputString.split(',');
var url = parts[0].trim();
try {
    var xDataRegex = /x-data="[^"]*Login\(\d+,\s*'([^']+)'/;
    var match = result.match(xDataRegex);
    if (match && match[1]) {
        datax = match[1];
    } else {
        java.log("未能从源码中匹配并提取到 x-data token");
        throw new Error("XSRF token not found"); // Token 是必须的
    }
    var urlWithXsrf = url + "?_xsrf=" + encodeURIComponent(datax);
    var cookie = "85_ID=" + java.getCookie(url, "85_ID");
    var baseHeaders = {
        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; 2312DRAABC) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/132.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36",
        "Content-Type": "application/json;charset=UTF-8",
        "Referer": url,
        "Accept": "application/json, text/plain",
        "Cookie": cookie
    };
    var slices = [];
    var selectContentRegex = /<select class="[^"]*select-primary[^"]*"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/select>/;
    var selectMatch = result.match(selectContentRegex);
    if (selectMatch && selectMatch[1]) {
        var optionsHtml = selectMatch[1];
        var sliceRegex = /(\d+)\s*~\s*(\d+)/g;
        var sliceMatch;
        while ((sliceMatch = sliceRegex.exec(optionsHtml)) !== null) {
            var start = parseInt(sliceMatch[1], 10);
            var end = parseInt(sliceMatch[2], 10);
            if (!isNaN(start) && !isNaN(end)) {
                slices.push([start, end]);
            }
        }
    }
    if (slices.length === 0) {
        java.log("未能提取到任何章节 Slice，将尝试获取默认范围 [1, 200]");
        slices = [
            [1, 200]
        ];
    }
    java.log("将要处理的 Slices: " + JSON.stringify(slices));
    for (var i = 0; i < slices.length; i++) {
        var currentSlice = slices[i];
        // java.log("准备获取 Slice: " + currentSlice.join(' ~ '));
        var maxAttempts = 3;
        var success = false;
        for (var attempt = 1; attempt <= maxAttempts; attempt++) {
            java.log("尝试获取 Slice " + currentSlice.join('~') + " (第 " + attempt + "/" + maxAttempts + " 次)");
            var jsonString = null;
            try {
                var bodyPayload = {
                    "action": "chapters",
                    "slice": currentSlice
                };
                var op = {
                    "body": JSON.stringify(bodyPayload),
                    "method": "post",
                    "headers": baseHeaders
                };
                var requestString = urlWithXsrf + "," + JSON.stringify(op);
                jsonString = java.ajax(requestString);
                if (jsonString && (jsonString.trim().startsWith('{') || jsonString.trim().startsWith('['))) {
                    var jsonObject = JSON.parse(jsonString);
                    if (jsonObject && jsonObject.result && Array.isArray(jsonObject.result.chapters)) {
                        var fetchedCount = jsonObject.result.chapters.length;
                        allChapters = allChapters.concat(jsonObject.result.chapters);
                        // java.log("成功获取 Slice " + currentSlice.join('~') + " (第 " + attempt + " 次尝试): 本次获取 " + fetchedCount + " 章, 累计 " + allChapters.length + " 章");
                        java.log("成功获取 Slice " + currentSlice.join('~') + " (第 " + attempt + " 次尝试)");
                        success = true;
                        break;
                    } else {
                        java.log("第 " + attempt + " 次尝试: Slice " + currentSlice.join('-') + " 的 JSON 响应格式不正确或未包含 chapters 数组: " + jsonString.substring(0, 200));
                    }
                } else {
                    java.log("第 " + attempt + " 次尝试: Slice " + currentSlice.join('-') + " 返回的不是有效的 JSON: " + jsonString.substring(0, 200));
                    java.log("Slice " + currentSlice.join('-') + " Raw Response (Attempt " + attempt + "): " + jsonString);
                }
            } catch (ajaxOrParseError) {
                java.log("第 " + attempt + " 次尝试获取或解析 Slice " + currentSlice.join('-') + " 时出错: " + ajaxOrParseError);
            }
            if (!success && attempt < maxAttempts) {
                var retryDelay = 4000;
                java.log("等待 " + retryDelay + "ms 后重试...");

                Packages.java.lang.Thread.sleep(retryDelay);
            } else if (!success && attempt === maxAttempts) {

                java.log("已达到最大尝试次数 (" + maxAttempts + ")，放弃获取 Slice 重新搜索过下cf试试" + currentSlice.join('~'));
            }
        }
        if (i < slices.length - 1) {
            java.log("等待2500ms");
            Packages.java.lang.Thread.sleep(2500);
        }
    }
    var combinedResult = {
        "code": 0,
        "result": {
            "code": 1,
            "chapters": allChapters
        }
    };
    finalJsonOutput = JSON.stringify(combinedResult);

} catch (e) {
    java.log("处理目录 JS 规则时发生顶层错误: " + e);
    finalJsonOutput = null;
}
result = finalJsonOutput; 
</js>
$.result.chapters

//无名25.05.01修
//25.05.02用电脑ua解决搜索下一页，验证成功跳转后请重新搜索
header: {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; 2312DRAADC) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/132.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36"}

ruleSearch.author: $.author
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
if(result.match(/百度安全验证/)){
	xb=(baseUrl)+","+JSON.stringify({
		"headers":{
			"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86 64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/127.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
}})
java.startBrowserAwait(xb,"验证")
result=java.ajax(xb)
	}

var bookList = [];
var finalJsonOutput = null;
try {
    var doc = result;
    if (!doc) {
        throw new Error("无法解析 HTML");
    }
    var containers = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(doc).select("div.c-container.result-op, div.c-container.result");
    java.log("找到 " + containers.size() + " 个");
    for (var i = 0; i < containers.size(); i++) {
        var container = containers.get(i);
        var book = {};
        if (container.hasClass("result-op")) {            
            java.log("处理第 " + (i + 1) + " 个 (result-op)");            
            book.bookUrl = container.attr("mu") || null;             
            var nameElement = container.selectFirst("a");
            if (nameElement) {
                var nameText = nameElement.text().trim();
                book.name = (nameText) ? nameText : "未找到";
                if (!nameText) {
                    //java.log("未找到书名，a 标签内容: " + nameElement.outerHtml());
                }
            } else {
                book.name = "未找到";
                //java.log("未找到书名对应的 a 标签");
            }            
            var authorElement = container.selectFirst("span");
            if (authorElement) {
                var authorText = authorElement.text().trim();
                var prefix = "作者： "; 
                if (authorText.includes(prefix)) {
                    book.author = authorText.substring(prefix.length).trim();
                } else {
                    book.author = "未找到";
                    //java.log("作者信息未找到或格式不符: " + authorElement.outerHtml());
                }
            } else {
                book.author = "未找到";
                //java.log("未找到作者对应的 span 标签");
            }            
            var introElement = container.selectFirst("div.text_2NOr6");
            var introText = null;
            if (introElement) {
                introText = introElement.text().trim();
                book.intro = introText;                 
                book.kind = null; 
                if (!introText.startsWith("简介:")) {
                    var kindPrefix = "类别:";
                    var kindIndex = introText.indexOf(kindPrefix);
                    if (kindIndex !== -1) {
                        var kindTemp = introText.substring(kindIndex + kindPrefix.length).trim();
                        var chapterPrefix = "最新章节"; 
                        var chapterIndex = kindTemp.indexOf(chapterPrefix);
                        if (chapterIndex !== -1) {
                            book.kind = kindTemp.substring(0, chapterIndex).trim(); 
                        } else {
                            book.kind = kindTemp; 
                        }
                    } else {
                        //java.log("未在 intro 文本中找到 '类别:' 用于提取 kind: " + introText);
                    }
                } else {
                    //java.log("intro 文本以 '简介:' 开头，kind 设为 null");
                }
            } else {
                book.intro = null; 
                book.kind = null;
                //java.log("未找到 intro/kind 对应的 div.text_2NOr6 标签");
            }            
            var allAElements = container.select("a");
            if (allAElements.size() >= 2) {
                book.lastChapter = allAElements.get(allAElements.size() - 2).text().trim();
            } else {
                book.lastChapter = null; 
                //java.log("a 标签数量不足，无法提取倒数第二个作为 lastChapter");
            }
        } else if (container.hasClass("result")) {            
            java.log("处理第 " + (i + 1) + " (result)");            
            book.bookUrl = container.attr("mu") || null;            
            var nameElement = container.selectFirst("a");
            if (nameElement) {
                var nameText = nameElement.text().trim();
                book.name = (nameText) ? nameText : "未找到";
                if (!nameText) {
                   //java.log("未找到书名，a 标签内容: " + nameElement.outerHtml());
                }
            } else {
                book.name = "未找到";
                //java.log("未找到书名对应的 a 标签");
            }            
            var contentRightElement = container.selectFirst(".content-right_1THTn");
            if (contentRightElement) {
                var fullText = contentRightElement.text().trim();
                book.intro = fullText;                 
                book.author = null; 
                var authorPrefix = "作者:"; 
                var authorIndex = fullText.indexOf(authorPrefix);
                var kindSeparator = "类别"; 
                var kindIndexForAuthor = fullText.indexOf(kindSeparator);
                if (authorIndex !== -1) { 
                    var startIndex = authorIndex + authorPrefix.length;
                    var endIndex = (kindIndexForAuthor !== -1 && kindIndexForAuthor > authorIndex) ? kindIndexForAuthor : fullText.length;
                    book.author = fullText.substring(startIndex, endIndex).trim();
                } else {
                    //java.log("未在 .content-right_1THTn 中找到 '作者:'");
                }                
                book.kind = null; 
                var kindPrefix = "类别:"; 
                var kindIndex = fullText.indexOf(kindPrefix);
                var chapterSeparator = "最新章节"; 
                var chapterIndexForKind = fullText.indexOf(chapterSeparator);
                if (kindIndex !== -1) { 
                    var startIndex = kindIndex + kindPrefix.length;
                    var endIndex = (chapterIndexForKind !== -1 && chapterIndexForKind > kindIndex) ? chapterIndexForKind : fullText.length;
                    book.kind = fullText.substring(startIndex, endIndex).trim();
                } else {
                    //java.log("未在 .content-right_1THTn 中找到 '类别:'");
                }                
                book.lastChapter = null; 
                var chapterPrefix = "最新章节:"; 
                var chapterIndex = fullText.indexOf(chapterPrefix);
                var updateSeparator = "最新更新"; 
                var updateIndex = fullText.indexOf(updateSeparator);

                if (chapterIndex !== -1) { 
                    var startIndex = chapterIndex + chapterPrefix.length;
                    var endIndex = (updateIndex !== -1 && updateIndex > chapterIndex) ? updateIndex : fullText.length;
                    book.lastChapter = fullText.substring(startIndex, endIndex).trim();
                } else {
                    //java.log("未在 .content-right_1THTn 中找到 '最新章节:'");
                }
            } else {                
                book.author = null;
                book.kind = null;
                book.lastChapter = null;
                book.intro = null;
                //java.log("未找到 .content-right_1THTn 元素");
            }
        } else {
            //java.log("跳过未知类型的容器: " + container.outerHtml().substring(0, 100));
            continue; 
        }        
        bookList.push(book);
    }
    var finalResult = {
        bookList: bookList 
    };
    finalJsonOutput = JSON.stringify(finalResult);
} catch (e) {
    java.log("错误: " + e);
    finalJsonOutput = JSON.stringify({
        bookList: []
    }); 
}
result = finalJsonOutput;
</js>
$.bookList

    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";

        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,
                    "url": base_url +"/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + group[key].join(","),
                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
            groupDatas.push({
                "title": "--",
                "url": "",
                "style": {
                    "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                }
            });
        }
    }

if (`${score}`) {info = info +  `✨书籍评分：${score}\n`};

${abstract}\n`};
if (`${book_review}`) {info = info +  `‎\n${book_review}\n`};

        let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).data[0]; 
        return last["last_chapter_title"]+" · "+java.timeFormat(last["last_chapter_update_time"]*1000);
	
	}

	
function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var doc = result;
java.log("----" + baseUrl);
var finalContent = ""; 
try {
    var contentText = "";
    
    
    if (doc) {
        var contentElement = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(doc).select(".content");
        if (contentElement) {
            contentText = contentElement.text().trim();
        } else {
            contentText = "";
        }
    } else {
        // throw new Error("HTML parsing failed");
        contentText = "【无法解析HTML】"; 
    }
    // 解密
    var decryptedText = "";
    var atob = function(val) {
        try {
            return String(java.base64Decode(val, "ISO-8859-1"));
        } catch (e) {
            // java.log("Base64 解码失败 for: " + val + ", Error: " + e);
            return "";
        }
    };
    function _0x5472bc(_0x29b0fa) {
        return _0x29b0fa.slice().reverse();
    }
    function _0x17ef6d(aR) {
        var _0xe4c1a0 = '';
        try {
            for (var _0x15efce = 0; _0x15efce < aR.length; _0x15efce++) {
                _0xe4c1a0 += String.fromCharCode(aR[_0x15efce]);
            }
            return decodeURIComponent(escape(_0xe4c1a0));
        } catch(e) {
            // java.log("字节转字符串或 decodeURIComponent 出错: " + e);
            return _0xe4c1a0;
        }
    }
    function _0x325420(encodedData, encodedKey) {
        try {
            var keyBytesRaw = atob(encodedKey).split('').map(c => c.charCodeAt(0));
            if (!keyBytesRaw || keyBytesRaw.length === 0) throw new Error("解码后的密钥为空");
            var keyBytesProcessed = _0x5472bc(keyBytesRaw);
            if (!keyBytesProcessed || keyBytesProcessed.length === 0) throw new Error("处理后的密钥为空");

            var dataBytesRaw = atob(encodedData).split('').map(c => c.charCodeAt(0));
            if (!dataBytesRaw) throw new Error("解码后的数据为空");

            var decryptedBytes = dataBytesRaw.map((byte, index) => byte ^ keyBytesProcessed[index % keyBytesProcessed.length]);
            return _0x17ef6d(decryptedBytes);
        } catch (e) {
            // java.log("解密函数 _0x325420 内部错误: " + e);
            return "【解密过程出错】"; // 返回错误指示
        }
    }
    var paramRegex = /await\s+_0x\w+\('(.+?)','(.+?)'\)/;
    var ar = result.match(paramRegex);
    if (ar && ar[1] && ar[2]) {
        var encodedDataParam = ar[1];
        var encodedKeyParam = ar[2];
        // java.log("提取到加密参数，准备解密...");
        // --- 调用解密函数 ---
        decryptedText = _0x325420(encodedDataParam, encodedKeyParam);
        // java.log("解密后文本长度: " + decryptedText.length);
    } else {
        java.log("未能从 HTML 中用正则匹配到解密所需的参数");
        decryptedText = "【未能提取加密参数】"; // 设置错误提示
    }

    // --- 拼接结果
    finalContent = contentText + "\n\n" + decryptedText; 

} catch (e) {
    java.log("错误: " + e);
    finalContent = "【规则执行出错: " + e + "】"; // 在最终输出中包含错误信息
}
result = finalContent; 
</js>
ruleContent.nextContentUrl:
<js>
var nextChapterUrl = null; 
try {    
    var doc = result;
    if (!doc) {        
        throw new Error("HTML 解析失败"); 
    }        
    var nextLink = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(doc).select("a:containsOwn(下─章)");
    if (nextLink) {        
        var onclickValue = nextLink.attr("onclick");
        if (onclickValue) {                        
            var idRegex = /location\.href='([^']+)\.idx'/;
            var idMatch = onclickValue.match(idRegex);
            if (idMatch && idMatch[1]) {
                var chapterIdPart = idMatch[1];                 
                var checkRegex = /_\d+$/; 
                if (checkRegex.test(chapterIdPart)) {                                      
                    var newFileName = chapterIdPart + ".html";                                        
                    var lastSlashRegex = /\/[^/]*$/;
                    if (typeof baseUrl === 'string') {                        
                        nextChapterUrl = baseUrl.replace(lastSlashRegex, "/" + newFileName);
                        
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
} catch (e) {    
    nextChapterUrl = null; 
}
result = nextChapterUrl;
</js>

    function groupQuery() {
        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);
        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,
                    "url": base_url +"/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + group[key].join(","),
                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
            groupDatas.push({
                "title": "--",
                "url": "",
                "style": {
                    "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                }
            });
        }
    }

    try {
    	java.longToast("请稍等,正在更新分组数据!");

    const userUrl = base_url + '/fquser?sessionid={{String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid"))}}';

 } catch (e) {key='';}

	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}&sq_user_id=${sq_user_id}`;

        let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).data[0]; 
        return last["last_chapter_title"]+" · "+java.timeFormat(last["last_chapter_update_time"]*1000);
	
	}

	
function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];
let last2 =  `${last["latest_chapter_title"]} · ${java.timeFormat(last['update_time']*1000)} `

  media = "听书"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:")||String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
  media = "短剧"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:")||String(key).startsWith("x："))  {
	media = "小说"
  key = key.slice(2)
	} else {
	media = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'media',String(source.bookSourceComment));
	}
if (key.includes('@')) {
  const parts = key.split('@');
  key = parts[0];
  sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
	`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&key=${key2}`
</js>

	}

        const url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie={{String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com'))}}";
        const res = java.ajax(url);
        const data = JSON.parse(res).data;

        data.forEach(group => {
            let key;
            for (key in group) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    "title": key,
                    "url": base_url +"/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + group[key].join(","),
                    "style": {
                        "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                        "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        });

        if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
            groupDatas.push({
                "title": "--",
                "url": "",
                "style": {
                    "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                    "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
                }
            });
        }
    }

    try {
    	java.longToast("请稍等,正在更新分组数据!");
    // 用户信息
    const userUrl = base_url + '/fquser?sessionid={{String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid"))}}';

    const userInfo = JSON.parse(userRes).data.name;

            "title": `${userInfo}个人中心`,
            "url": "",
            "style": {
                "layout_flexGrow": 1,
                "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
            }
        }
    ];
    groupQuery();

let sources = res[3];

let key = '';

	key = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key = getKey(key);
 } catch (e) {key='';}
        
        
let device,device_type;
try {
    device = java.androidId();
    device_type='安卓';
} catch (e) {
    try{
device = java.deviceID();
device_type='苹果';
}catch (e) {device = '';
device_type='安卓';
}
}
let sq_user_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'sq_user_id',String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '0';

let content_url;
if (tab=='小说') {
	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}&sq_user_id=${sq_user_id}`;
 } 
 else if (tab=='听书') {
 	 	content_url= `/audio?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&tone_id=${tone_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 	} else if (tab=='漫画') {
 		 	content_url=	`/pic?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 		} else if (tab=='短剧') {
 		content_url=	`/video?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key}`;
 			}
 let data = java.ajax(base_url+content_url);
 try {
if (JSON.parse(data).msg) {
	java.toast(JSON.parse(data).msg);

if (device_type=='安卓' && tab  == '短剧'){

	}};

        let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).data[0]; 
        return last["last_chapter_title"]+" · "+java.timeFormat(last["last_chapter_update_time"]*1000);
	
	}

	
function qm_last() {
	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;

option = {'headers':headers};

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server',String(source.bookSourceComment));
let key2 = '';
try {
	key2 = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key2 = getKey(key2);
        } catch (e) {key2='';}


let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'source',String(source.bookSourceComment));
if (String(key).startsWith("m:")||String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
  media = "漫画"
  key = key.slice(2)
  }else if (String(key).startsWith("t:")||String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
  media = "听书"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:")||String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
  media = "短剧"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:")||String(key).startsWith("x："))  {
	media = "小说"
  key = key.slice(2)
	} else {
	media = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'media',String(source.bookSourceComment));
	}
if (key.includes('@')) {
  const parts = key.split('@');
  key = parts[0];
  sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
	`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&key=${key2}`
</js>

function getUrl(_) {
  const { java, source } =_|| this
  let v = String(source.getVariable())
  if(v.length < 1){
    source.setVariable("0")
    v = v.match(/^\d+$/) ? v : 0
  }
  return urls[v]
}

function getIndex(a){
	let i=urls.indexOf(a)+1
	return i
	}

<js>
paperid=baseUrl.match(/paperid=(\d+)/)[1];
code=result.match(/vercodechk.*?'[^']+'/)?result.match(/vercodechk.*?'([^']+)'/)[1]:'';
url='{{getUrl()}}showpapercolor.php,';
body='paperid='+paperid+'&vercodechk='+code;
option={
"method":"POST",
"body":String(body)
}
result=java.ajax(url+JSON.stringify(option));

eggs=java.getString('@@class.uk-placeholder.-1@html');
if(!eggs.match(/【作家想說的話：】|加載中.../) && eggs!=""){
eggs="【彩蛋内容：】"+eggs
}else{eggs=''}
write=java.getString('@@id.colorpanelwritersay@html');
result=result+write+eggs;
if(!String(result).match(/[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/) && !(String(result).match(/login\.php/))){
result="此章节需要购买\n💰"+java.getString('@@class.uk-card.0@class.uk-list.0@tag.li.10@text&&class.uk-alert-danger@html')
}else{result=result}
String(result).match(/login.php/)?'请登录后刷新正文阅读':result
</js>

if(key.match(/@视频/))
{
result='https://www.europeli.com/search?pid=0&keyword={{key.split("@")[0]}}&page={{page}}';
}

else if(key.match(/@图片/))
{
result='https://www.europeli.com/search?pid=2&keyword={{key.split("@")[0]}}&page={{page}}';
}

else if(key.match(/@漫画/))
{
result='https://www.europeli.com/search?pid=3&keyword={{key.split("@")[0]}}&page={{page}}';
}

else 
{
result='https://www.europeli.com/search?pid=1&keyword={{key}}&page={{page}}';
}


result
</js>

    return hasAName - hasBName ;
});
		list = list.concat(主页list)

ruleContent.content: var variable = source.getVariable(); var json = JSON.parse(variable); var type = json.type; var title = "video"; var url = baseUrl; if (/^http:\/\/img5\.adesk\.com\/.+/.test(url)) { content = `` } else if (title==type) { java.startBrowser(`data:text/html;charset=utf-8,${title}`, chapter.title) java.toast('正在加载视频\n视频加载较慢，请耐心等待') content = `如果视频未加载，点击右上角刷新播放视频\n当前视频直链为：\n${url}` } else { content = `` }

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var book_id = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
var url = getHost() + "/index.php/post/view/" + book_id + "?with_ids=1&type=read";
var content = java.ajax(url);
var json = JSON.parse(content);
var vip = json.data.detail.need_pay;
//java.log(vip)
var isVIP = "true";
var noVIP = "false";
if (vip==false) {
	var Content = json.data.detail.content;
	} else {
	var text = json.data.detail.des;
	var mesage = "本章为VIP章节，请购买后阅读！";
	var mes = "本章为会员章节，请登录并购买！！";
	var Content = `${mesage}\n【试读：】\n${text}`;
	java.toast(mes);
	}
Content
</js>

if (detail) {
     book.type=64     
} else {
		  book.type=8

		java.log(book.type)   
var JsDom = Packages.org.jsoup.Jsoup;
var Document = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Document;
var Element = Packages.org.jsoup.nodes.Element;
var document = JsDom.parse(src);

var result = [];

var volumes = document.select(".catalog-volume");
for (var i = 0; i < volumes.size(); i++) {
    var volElement = volumes.get(i);
    
   
    var volTitle = "";
    var volBar = volElement.select(".chapter-bar").first();
    if (volBar) {
        volTitle = volBar.text().trim();
    }
    
   
    var chapters = volElement.select(".chapter-li");
    for (var j = 0; j < chapters.size(); j++) {
        var chapter = chapters.get(j);
        var link = chapter.select("a").first();
        
        if (link) {
            var entry = {
                "text": link.text().trim(),
                "url": link.attr("href").trim(),
                "vol": volTitle
            };
            result.push(entry);
        }
    }
}

result;</js>

<js>
function processKey() {
  var pattern = /(?:\s+)?@(小说|漫画)(?:\s+)?$/;
  var match = key.match(pattern);
   let originalType = 0;
  if (match) {
      key = key.replace(pattern, "").trim();
      originalType = match[1] === "漫画" ? 1 : 0;
  }
   return {
   	text: key,
    type: originalType
  };
}
var result = processKey(); 

var keyxmode=result.type;
//java.log(keyxmode);
if(keyxmode == 0){
    java.log("当前为小说模式");
    
    page==1?
'https://www.bilinovel.com/search.html?searchkey='+result.text+',{"headers": {"referer": "https://www.bilinovel.com/search.html"}}'
:

'https://www.bilinovel.com/search/'+result.text+'_{{page}}.html,{"headers": {"referer": "${bilinovel}search.html"}}'
    
}else{

'https://www.bilimanga.net/search.html?searchkey='+result.text+',{"headers": {"referer": "https://www.bilimanga.net/search.html"}}'

<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString(".word_read@p@text",ml);
    java.toast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleContent.content: params = result.match(/params = '([^']+)'/)[1]; function decryptEncryptedData(encryptedData) { const encryptedDataWithIV = CryptoJS.enc.Base64.parse(encryptedData); const iv = CryptoJS.lib.WordArray.create(encryptedDataWithIV.words.slice(0, 16)); const encryptedBytes = encryptedDataWithIV.words.slice(4); const encryptedHex = CryptoJS.enc.Hex.stringify(CryptoJS.lib.WordArray.create(encryptedBytes)); const keyUtf8 = CryptoJS.enc.Utf8.parse("5V&RoR%Jf@pJPydF"); const decrypted = CryptoJS.AES.decrypt( { ciphertext: CryptoJS.enc.Hex.parse(encryptedHex) }, keyUtf8, { iv: iv } ); const decryptedText = decrypted.toString(CryptoJS.enc.Utf8); return decryptedText; } img = String(decryptEncryptedData(params)).replace(/\\|\"/g,'').replace(/.*\[(.*)\].*/g,'$1').replace(/\,/g,'\n') let url="https://six.mhpic.net"; result=img.split('\n').map(x=>``).join('\n');
